svg.text: Koe COIN Lite v2 -- nRF5340 + nRF21540 PA/LNA (1km BLE)
28mm round | 2-layer FR-4 1.0mm | BLE 5.4 | MAX98357A Amp | USB-C 16P data+charge
28mm round | 2-layer | 42 parts | nRF5340 BLE 5.4 + nRF21540 PA/LNA 1km
USB-C 5V → TP4054 (LiPo CHG) + AP2112K (3.3V LDO) → nRF5340 + nRF21540 + MAX98357A
nRF21540 PA/LNA: +20dBm TX / -95dBm RX sensitivity = 1km outdoor BLE range
